display.purpose: Hero heading only, one per page.

headline.purpose: Section titles, always paired with a leading emoji.

label.purpose: Nav links, buttons, table headers, form labels, badges.

aside.purpose: Quiet secondary lines: hero subtext, soft asides.

shadows.name: button-press
shadows.purpose: Hard step shadow under .pixel-btn on hover; removed on :active.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Hard step shadow under .pixel-card on hover.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Soft focus ring on form fields — the one allowed non-hard shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing across buttons, cards, and nav links (0.15–0.3s).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button, e.g. 'Configurează turnul tău'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', cursive; font-size: 11px; color: #FFFFFF; background: #8F4509; border: 3px solid #3D2B1F; padding: 16px 24px; min-height: 44px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-decoration: none; text-align: center; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A8540F; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 #3D2B1F; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3D2B1F; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary button variant — transparent fill, orange border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', cursive; font-size: 11px; color: #8F4509; background: transparent; border: 3px solid #8F4509; padding: 12px 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(232, 134, 42, 0.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #8F4509; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Pixel Card
components.description: Standard content card with the signature echo-outline double border.
components.html:
🪵

Lemn natural de brad

Încurajează felinele să-și ascută ghearele în mod natural.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 3px solid #E8862A; padding: 24px; position: relative; text-align: center; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; right: -4px; width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 2px solid rgba(232, 134, 42, 0.2); z-index: -1; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 0 rgba(232, 134, 42, 0.15); } .ds-card-icon { font-size: 40px; margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', cursive; font-size: 11px; color: #8F4509; margin-bottom: 12px; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-card-text { font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #3D2B1F; opacity: 0.85; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field, e.g. the collaboration form.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Ex: Asociația Prietenii Felinelor" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #3D2B1F; background: #FFFFFF; border: 3px solid #E8862A; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3D2B1F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(232, 134, 42, 0.2); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #3D2B1F; opacity: 0.55; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation with pixel-dashed bottom border.
components.html:
NEBI
  • Misiune
  • Magazin
  • Colaborari
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 70px; padding: 0 30px; background: #FFF8F0; border-bottom: 3px solid #E8862A; position: relative; } .ds-nav::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -7px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, #E8862A 0px, #E8862A 4px, transparent 4px, transparent 8px); } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', cursive; font-size: 16px; color: #8F4509; letter-spacing: 2px; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 8px; list-style: none; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: 'Press Start 2P', cursive; font-size: 9px; color: #3D2B1F; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 14px; border: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover, .ds-nav-links a.active { color: #8F4509; border-color: #E8862A; background: rgba(232, 134, 42, 0.1); }

components.name: Tower Level (signature)
components.description: One stacked level of the configurator's pixel-art tower preview, with a special-piece glow variant.
components.css: .ds-tower-level { display: flex; justify-content: center; position: relative; margin-bottom: -4px; } .ds-tower-level-block { width: 120px; height: 40px; background: #C8A96E; image-rendering: pixelated; } .ds-tower-level--sisal .ds-tower-level-block { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(200, 169, 110, 0.8)) brightness(1.1); } .ds-tower-level--rope .ds-tower-level-block { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(160, 120, 90, 0.8)) brightness(0.95) saturate(0.8); }

narrative.overview: NEBI reads like a hand-built game cartridge for a hand-built product: a warm-wood, pixel-drawn cat tower rendered with the same care as its physical joinery. The system pairs a chunky, all-caps pixel typeface for structure and voice with a soft, rounded body font for reading — the same split a good indie game uses between its HUD and its dialogue box. Every surface is flat and sharp-cornered (no radius except the one deliberate exception, the speech bubble); depth comes from hard-edged, zero-blur "step" shadows and a doubled echo-outline, never from blur or glass. This is a maker's aesthetic, not a startup's: warm, friendly, playful, with real empathy for animals — stated as NEBI's own brand guidelines — but never cute-cartoon and never boutique-sterile. It explicitly rejects sterile corporate e-commerce (cold, catalog-like, big-box-furniture-retailer polish) and the two traps adjacent to it: generic pastel pet-startup sameness (soft gradients, blob illustrations) and childish cartoon-mascot pet branding.
keyCharacteristics: Two-voice typography: pixel display type for structure, Nunito for reading, VT323 for a quieter aside voice.
Flat, sharp-cornered surfaces; depth via hard offset shadows, not blur.
One saturated accent (NEBI Orange) carrying nav, headings, buttons, and borders — a Committed color strategy, not a full palette.
Genuine pixel-art texture (grid background, pixelated image-rendering, retro cat sprite animation) rather than decorative flourish.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: NEBI Orange is the only saturated color in the system. Green appears exactly once, as an adoption-status signal, never as decoration. There is no secondary or tertiary brand color — resist adding one.

rules.name: The Text-Safe Orange Rule
rules.body: Bright NEBI Orange (#E8862A) is decorative only — borders, dividers, glows. Anything rendering as text, or filling a shape that light text sits on, uses Orange Text (#8F4509) or Orange Text Hover (#A8540F) instead. Never let the bright brand orange carry text again; it reads as brand personality but fails contrast at ~2.5:1.

rules.name: The Density Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Press Start 2P is never set smaller than 7px or used for more than one short phrase at a time — it's a structural/label face, not a reading face. If a sentence needs the pixel font, it's too long; move it to Nunito or VT323.

rules.name: The Hard Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow in the system is a flat, zero-blur offset (0 Npx 0 color), never 0 Npx Mpx blur color. Blur reads as glass or as a generic SaaS card; NEBI's depth is print-registration depth, not glow depth.

dos: Do keep every surface sharp-cornered (0 radius); the one approved exception is the 4px-radius speech bubble.
Do use zero-blur, solid-offset shadows only (0 Npx 0 color) — the Hard Shadow Rule.
Do lead sections with an emoji + .section-title, never an uppercase tracked eyebrow line.
Do keep Press Start 2P to short phrases (labels, titles, headings) and route anything paragraph-length to Nunito.
Do let NEBI Orange stay the only saturated color; Success Green is reserved for adoption-status text only.
Do communicate special/premium pieces (sisal, rope) through colored glow/filter, matching the Tower Preview pattern, not through badges or stripes.
donts: Don't make the site feel like sterile corporate e-commerce — no cold catalog grids, no big-box-furniture-retailer polish. This is PRODUCT.md's primary anti-reference.
Don't drift toward generic pastel pet-startup sameness — no soft gradients, no blob illustrations, no Instagram-startup rounded-everything look.
Don't tip into cutesy cartoon-mascot pet branding — NEBI's playfulness is pixel-art-deliberate, not childish; keep the sprite cat expressive but not saccharine.
Don't use blurred/glow box-shadows or glassmorphism anywhere — depth is hard-edged only.
Don't use gradient text or background-clip: text treatments — emphasis comes from the pixel face and color, not gradients.

Don't simulate proof that doesn't exist yet (stock photography standing in for the real prototype, invented testimonials) — the product photo placeholders explicitly say 'in curand' rather than fake it, and that honesty should hold everywhere else too.
Don't add a second or third saturated accent color 'for variety' — the One Accent Rule holds even under pressure to add visual interest.
